calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-04-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank, A Bank Chartered Under the Laws of the State of Utah.
No appearance by defendant Vladimir A. Sarser, an Individual.
Amended Default entered against defendant on July 22, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on July 9, 2008.
Order waiving appearance of witness at default prove-up hearing was filed on July 22, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank, A Bank Chartered Under the Laws of the State of Utah, and against the Defaulted Defendant Vladimir A. Sarser, an Individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $213,586.11.
Prejudgment Interest - $0.00.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $430.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $214,016.11.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
